tagline: Building full-stack AI products — multi-agent systems, computer vision, and products that ship.
description: Final-year B.Tech IT student who designs and ships full-stack AI systems — multi-agent architectures, computer vision pipelines, and production-ready web platforms.

roles.detailed: AI Agents | Computer Vision | Full-Stack Development

bio: Final-year B.Tech IT student who ships production AI systems using modern LLM tooling — including a 7-agent retail platform designed for India's 15M+ kirana store market and a real-time multi-model surveillance system. Proficient in integrating and deploying full-stack AI products using Python, FastAPI, React, and the Gemini API, with hands-on experience in Docker, PostgreSQL, computer vision pipelines, and multi-agent architectures. Seeking Full-Stack + AI internship opportunities.

bullets: Built a multi-tenant POS PWA for India's 15M+ kirana stores — real-time billing, stock management, customer credit ledger with rule-based risk classification, and GST-format tax reports, all from live per-store transaction data.
Built a WhatsApp storefront bot that answers customer stock/price queries from live inventory; implemented OCR bill digitization via Gemini Vision with confidence scoring.
Shipped 6-language UI, offline-first sync via IndexedDB, JWT auth with DB-persisted revocation, server-side RBAC, and idempotent serverless schema reconciliation on Vercel cold starts.
experience.desc: A multi-tenant POS PWA for India's kirana stores — real-time billing, inventory, a customer credit ledger, and GST tax reports from live data, with a WhatsApp storefront bot and Gemini Vision OCR, shipped offline-first on Vercel serverless.

bullets: Architected a multi-model detection pipeline (InsightFace + OSNet Re-ID + DeepSORT + YOLOv8) achieving 90%+ accuracy.
Stored 512-dimensional face embeddings in PostgreSQL with pgvector for cross-location person tracking.
Improved night-time detection accuracy from 55% to 78%+ via CLAHE, gamma correction, and bilateral filtering.
Built a crowd-mode that boosts crowd-detection accuracy from 65% to 85%+ by splitting frames into quadrants, plus a React operator dashboard with real-time person trails and zone-based alerts.
experience.desc: A multi-model camera-based detection system with a real-time operator dashboard, multi-location analytics, and zone-based alerting.

experience.company: Sri Krishna College of Technology, Coimbatore
bullets: Coursework: Database Management Systems, Data Structures, Statistics. Current CGPA: 7.3.
2nd Prize, UI/UX Design — designed a data-driven ticket booking app, conducted A/B testing with 50+ users in Figma, and secured a Top 2 rank among 85+ entries.
Hackathon Finalist (2026) — solved offline billing for low/unstable internet using an IndexedDB-based sync system; shortlisted to the final round.
experience.desc: B.Tech in Information Technology, with hands-on achievements in UI/UX design and hackathon finals alongside coursework in databases, data structures, and statistics.
